case_title: ERIKA FRICK VS. VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS LP ET AL

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ERIKA FRICK APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS: VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS LP'S REPRESENTATIVE TIMOTHY REID, SF SPCA'S REPRESENTATIVE THOMAS MASON, DVM AND WITNESS KRISTINE CHAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2016 - CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ERIKA FRICK, VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALIST REPRESENTATIVE TIMOTHY REID REGIONAL OPERATIONS DIRECTOR, SF SPCA REPRESENTATIVE THOMAS MASON, DIRECTOR OF VETINARY MEDICINE AND DR. KRISTINE CHAN FROM SF SPCA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF ERICK FRICK RE: AMENDING CLAIM AND RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRICK, ERIKA
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-17-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-19-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRICK, ERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS LP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-13-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS LP

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FRICK, ERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS LP SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-15-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-05-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ERIKA FRICK AND DEFENDANTS' REPRESENTATIVES TIMOTHY REID, REGIONAL OPERATIONS MANAGER FOR VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS, LP, AND THOMAS MASON, VICE PRESIDENT OF THE SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS. PROOF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CONTINUE TRIAL PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO NOVEMBER 28, 2016 AT 3:30PM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRICK, ERIKA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALISTS LP SAN FRANCISCO SOCIETY FOR THE PREVENTION OF CRUELTY TO ANIMALS NO EVIDENCE WAS PRESENTED THAT DEFENDANTS' TREATMENT OF HARVEY, THE CAT, FELL BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE FAILS TO SUPPORT HER CLAIM THAT DEFENDANTS CAUSED DAMAGE TO HER CAT. ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF FAILS TO OFFER ANY EXPERT OPINION AS TO THE CAUSE OF ANY INJURY TO HARVEY RESULTING FROM THE TREATMENT PROVIDED BY DEFENDANTS. (CONTINUED - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
